steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE AS PERIOD_END, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, ACCOUNT_VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '03.220.438/0001-73' AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE IN ('2024-12-31','2024-09-30','2024-06-30','2024-03-31') ORDER BY PERIOD_END, ACCOUNT_NUMBER;"}}
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE AS PERIOD_END, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '03.220.438/0001-73' ORDER BY PERIOD_END DESC LIMIT 1;"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool
